component.name: Shadow Settings
component.summary: The settings hiding in the shadow of your system

description.p: Shadow Settings dynamically discovers and surfaces hidden GNOME desktop settings that are not exposed in the standard Settings app. It scans your system at runtime to find settings specific to your GNOME version and installed components.

ul.li: Discovers hundreds of hidden GSettings keys automatically
Reset any setting to its default value
Three distinctive Art Deco visual themes

screenshot.caption: Shadow Settings showing the Desktop category
